title: Reading and Use of English – Part 8
description: You are going to read an article about four people who undertook a creative pursuit. For questions 47–56, choose from the people A–D. The people may be chosen more than once.

texts.A:
### Emma, Aspiring Painter
I embarked on my journey as a painter six months ago. At first, I was overwhelmed by the sheer number of techniques and materials I needed to master. Yet, [48]what truly challenged me[/48] was developing my own style. Joining a local art group was a game-changer. Sharing feedback and seeing immediate improvements in my work, I was [50]amazed at how quickly my skills improved.[/50] The camaraderie and encouragement from fellow artists have made each session something I look forward to, even if [47]at first it was a bit intimidating[/47].
texts.B:
### Oliver, Amateur Sculptor
Taking up sculpting was a spontaneous decision that turned into a passion. I hadn’t expected to settle in so fast, [47]but I was surprised by how quickly I adapted[/47] to a disciplined practice. I found sculpting to be an incredibly therapeutic activity, [51]helping me relax after a stressful day[/51]. Despite the initial challenges with materials, [55]the rapid progress I experienced[/55] was motivating. Attending workshops has been invaluable, providing a space to learn and experiment freely.
texts.C:
### Lucy, Novelist in Training
Writing a novel was something I had always dreamed of. With a full-time job, finding the motivation and time to write was daunting. However, [50]the rapid improvement in my writing skills[/50] took me by surprise. I joined an online community of writers where we shared our experiences, which was [52]an unexpected source of inspiration[/52]. My goal is to complete my first draft by the end of the year, and the support from other authors has been crucial in maintaining my progress.
texts.D:
### Sam, DIY Musician
Starting as a musician was both challenging and invigorating. While [48]struggling initially with music theory,[/48] persevering has been immensely rewarding. I didn’t realize how much I would enjoy composing. The joy of creating something uniquely mine has been the greatest reward. Collaborating with other musicians online has not only widened my perspective but [54]deeply enriched my learning experience.[/54] My approach has evolved significantly, and now I appreciate each layer of complexity in music.

questions.question: mentions being surprised by how quickly they adapted to a new routine?
questions.explanation: B says: 'I hadn’t expected to settle in so fast...'

questions.question: describes finding a particular aspect initially challenging?
questions.explanation: D refers to 'struggling initially with music theory.'

questions.question: mentions collaborating with others?
questions.explanation: D mentions 'collaborating with other musicians online.'

questions.question: mentions being surprised by how quickly their skills improved?
questions.explanation: A expresses surprise at 'how quickly my skills improved.'

questions.question: mentions an activity helping them relax?
questions.explanation: B mentions 'sculpting to be an incredibly therapeutic activity.'

questions.question: mentions receiving unexpected inspiration from others?
questions.explanation: C talks about an online community being 'an unexpected source of inspiration.'

questions.question: describes enjoying creating something unique?
questions.explanation: D finds joy in 'creating something uniquely mine.'

questions.question: mentions their learning experience being enriched by others?
questions.explanation: D mentions that online collaboration 'deeply enriched my learning experience.'

questions.question: mentions rapid progress being a motivating factor?
questions.explanation: B mentions that 'the rapid progress I experienced was motivating.'

questions.question: mentions a goal to finish a major project?
questions.explanation: C talks about the goal to 'complete my first draft by the end of the year.'
